ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cut_lines" (
  "cut_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cut line */,
  "cut_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cut line */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the cut line is situated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cut line and its purpose */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cut line was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for data collection */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cut_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cut_lines_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "cut_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cut line where data was collected */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume of traffic measured */,
  "total_counts" INTEGER /* Total counts of vehicles */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of counts recorded */,
  "pct_diff" REAL /* Percentage difference between planned and actual traffic volume */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was collected */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during data collection */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_cut_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cut_line_id") REFERENCES cut_lines ("cut_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the traffic engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the traffic engineer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the traffic engineer */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the engineer is based */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the traffic engineer */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the traffic engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_engineers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cut_line_engineer_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "cut_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cut line assigned */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic engineer assigned */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cut_line_engineer_assignments_cut_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cut_line_id") REFERENCES cut_lines ("cut_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cut_line_engineer_assignments_engineer_id FOREIGN KEY ("engineer_id") REFERENCES traffic_engineers ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic pattern */,
  "cut_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cut line where the pattern is observed */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic pattern */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pattern */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pattern */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours during which the pattern is most noticeable */,
  "traffic_volume_trend" TEXT /* Trend of traffic volume during the pattern */,
  "vehicle_speed_trend" TEXT /* Trend of vehicle speed during the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_patterns_cut_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cut_line_id") REFERENCES cut_lines ("cut_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic incident */,
  "cut_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cut line where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was resolved */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "incident_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the incident on traffic flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_cut_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cut_line_id") REFERENCES cut_lines ("cut_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "cut_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cut line where the signal is located */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic signal */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the traffic signal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the traffic signal (e.g., operational, maintenance required) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal (e.g., fixed-time, traffic-actuated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_cut_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cut_line_id") REFERENCES cut_lines ("cut_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the TMS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the TMS was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the TMS was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES traffic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the export was requested */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of data being exported (e.g., traffic data, incident reports) */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the export request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
